name: file_reader
description: Read, list, or search files within workspace_focus. Supports line range (offset/limit), directory listing, and regex pattern search (grep).

path.description: Path relative to workspace_focus. For pattern search, may be a file or directory (recursive).

offset.description: First line to read (1-indexed). Only for file reads.

limit.description: Maximum number of lines to return. Only for file reads.

pattern.description: Regex pattern to search for. When set, returns matching lines with file path and line number instead of file content.
